Touch buttons now taller lozenges (height clamp 62-84px, radius 22px) for easier tapping. Added an on-screen R (Reset/Spit Star) button stacked above jump, wired to triggerSizeReset with haptic + disabled-state mirroring; panel reset hidden on touch devices. Bumped css?v=3, js?v=22.

Touch buttons now taller lozenges (height clamp 62-84px, radius 22px) for easier tapping. Added an on-screen R (Reset/Spit Star) button stacked above jump, wired to triggerSizeReset with haptic + disabled-state mirroring; panel reset hidden on touch devices. Bumped css?v=3, js?v=22.

Rewrote d-pad handling to track the control under each finger via document-level pointermove + elementFromPoint, removing per-button setPointerCapture; left/right now a gapless segmented pad. Sliding between buttons works without lifting. css v=4, js v=23.
